name: Influenza Vaccine CVX Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for influenza (flu) vaccines including inactivated, live attenuated, recombinant, cell-culture, and high-dose formulations. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS), adult immunization (AIS), and annual influenza vaccination measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
